title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Narayana Health South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Narayana Health South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Medical Officer to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Narayana Health South Asia Partners:
Narayana Health South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health South Asia Partners!
